name: Mini Rice Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, 1 cup cheese and 2 eggs, slightly beaten.
2. Press 1 tablespoon of this mixture into the bottoms of 48 miniature muffin cups that have been sprayed with a non-stick spray.
3. Bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
4. Combine bacon, chiles, pimentos, parsley and remaining cheese.
5. Spoon evenly over rice layer.
6. Blend milk, seasonings and remaining eggs.
7. Spoon into each cup.
8. Return to oven; bake 15 more minutes or until set.
9. Makes 48 appetizers.
